title: dendranthema × morifolium
intro: Dendranthema × morifolium, also known as Chrysanthemum or Florist's Chrysanthemum, is a hybrid plant in the daisy family, bred for its large, showy flowers and used extensively in floral arrangements. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. The health benefits of Dendranthema × morifolium include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
